checklist.description: A new documentation file exists in docs/ that covers context pack compilation. It must be discoverable as a top-level docs file (not buried in a subdirectory).
checklist.example: docs/CONTEXT_PACK_GUIDE.md is created as a new file.
checklist.name: guide_exists_in_docs

checklist.description: The guide explains all four compile levers with enough detail that a reader knows what each does and when to use it: task_prompt (semantic query), lambda (relevance vs diversity tradeoff), importance/recency weights, and tag filters (include_tags/exclude_tags).
checklist.example: CONTEXT_PACK_GUIDE.md has a 'The compile levers' section covering task_prompt, lambda, w_importance, w_recency, and tag filters with descriptions and guidance.
checklist.name: compile_levers_documented

checklist.description: The guide includes at least two concrete worked examples (scenarios) that show specific compile parameter values and explain why those values were chosen for that task type.
checklist.example: CONTEXT_PACK_GUIDE.md has scenarios A (REST route), B (crypto/signing), and C (Keto auth), each with task_prompt, lambda, weights, and result description.
checklist.name: worked_scenarios_included

checklist.description: PROVENANCE.md describes three goals for MoltNet, not two. The third goal must include the concept of verifying or measuring whether compiled context actually improves agent work.
checklist.example: PROVENANCE.md 'Why This Exists' now reads 'MoltNet has three related but distinct goals' and adds 'verify that the compiled context actually improves agent work'.
checklist.name: provenance_three_goals

checklist.description: PROVENANCE.md's artifact model (the bullet list of entries, relations, packs, viewer) is updated to reflect the third goal — the eval/benchmarking artifact type is present alongside entries, packs, and viewer.
checklist.example: PROVENANCE.md adds 'eval tasks are benchmarks that measure whether packs help (goal 3: verification)' to the artifact model list.
checklist.name: provenance_artifact_model_updated

checklist.description: The new guide and the existing key docs (at minimum PROVENANCE.md, GEPA.md, and GPACK_PIPELINE.md) include cross-links to each other, following the Related docs pattern used elsewhere in the docs/ directory.
checklist.example: GEPA.md and GPACK_PIPELINE.md get Related docs blocks linking to CONTEXT_PACK_GUIDE.md; PROVENANCE.md links to the new guide in a further reading section; the new guide links to PROVENANCE.md, GPACK_PIPELINE.md, GEPA.md.
checklist.name: docs_cross_linked

checklist.description: The guide explains where diary entries come from as the source pool for packs — at minimum: scan-derived entries and decisions/incidents as distinct entry types with different tagging.
checklist.example: CONTEXT_PACK_GUIDE.md has a 'Where entries come from' section covering legreffier-scan (source:scan), consolidate (tiles/nuggets), accountable commits, and decisions/incidents.
checklist.name: entry_sources_covered

checklist.description: The guide includes anti-patterns or pitfalls section — specific mistakes that lead to poor packs, not generic advice.
checklist.example: CONTEXT_PACK_GUIDE.md includes anti-patterns like: no task_prompt produces importance-ranked rather than relevance-ranked results; token budget too large pulls in tail entries; lambda 1.0 can include near-duplicates.
checklist.name: anti_patterns_or_pitfalls

checklist.description: If the guide covers the custom pack type, it accurately represents the current implementation status — not describing it as fully implemented when it is not.
checklist.example: CONTEXT_PACK_GUIDE.md states the custom pack route is not yet implemented: 'The route to create custom packs is not yet implemented.'
checklist.name: custom_pack_type_status

context: Evaluates whether the agent adds a context pack compilation guide to docs/, fixes PROVENANCE.md's goals count, and cross-links the documentation ecosystem.
